structural_layer.control_flow_shape: Graph contains an initial divergence from N1 into parallel or alternative nodes (N2A, N2B, N2C), converging at N3, passing to N4 which serves as a 3-way decision point: a termination branch, a finalization branch via N6, and a feedback loop branch via N5 that re-diverges into N2A, N2B, N2C.

postconditions.value: Graph ends at END via either N4 or N6
postconditions.source_text: N6 -> END, N4 -> END [continuation not justified]

stopping_criteria.value: One path selected (leads to N6 then END)

body.description: expands one state into multiple paths
re-sorts path fit after the new input appears
closes the graph when one path remains strongest after re-sorting
reopens continuation when separation remains weak

representation_layer.natural_language_summary: The procedure initiates at START and moves to N1, where an initial state is expanded into multiple paths leading to intermediate state nodes N2A, N2B, and N2C. These paths converge at N3, which introduces a differentiating input. N4 then evaluates the paths by re-sorting their fit based on the new input. From N4, three outcomes are possible: if one path is successfully selected, the procedure finishes via N6 to END; if continuing the process is no longer justified, it terminates directly to END; if a threshold is not met due to weak path separation, N5 reopens continuation, feeding back into N2A, N2B, or N2C to repeat the refinement cycle.
representation_layer.canonical_summary: START -> N1 -> [N2A | N2B | N2C] -> N3 -> N4 -> { [one path selected] -> N6 -> END | [continuation not justified] -> END | [threshold not met] -> N5 -> [N2A | N2B | N2C] -> ... }

ambiguities.location: Transitions N1 -> N2A/N2B/N2C and N5 -> N2A/N2B/N2C
ambiguities.description: The exact distribution or choice rules among N2A, N2B, and N2C are not defined.
plausible_interpretations: Execution occurs across all paths in parallel.
A single path is chosen based on an unspecified criterion.
ambiguities.effect_on_extraction: The exact flow topology within the N2 subset cannot be deterministically ordered beyond parallel or conditional branching.

recognition_analysis.recognition_basis: The procedure maps out abstract graph node relationships and states, without matching any specific known domain standard or signature.

notes: The provided edge order in the packet was shuffled, but topological reconstruction uniquely identifies the execution pathways and the structural loop established by node N5.
